user.title: Connect to Portfolio Valuator
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Portfolio Valuator service. The API token is only required if the service has one configured.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Portfolio Valuator service.
error.invalid_auth: The API token was rejected by the service.
error.unknown: Unexpected error – see Home Assistant logs.

abort.already_configured: This Portfolio Valuator instance is already configured.

init.title: Portfolio Valuator options
init.description: Adjust connection and polling behaviour. Changes reload the integration.

data.rest_fallback: Periodic REST poll while WebSocket is connected

error.scan_interval_out_of_range: Scan interval must be between 10 and 3600 seconds.

force_refresh.name: Force refresh
force_refresh.description: Trigger an immediate REST refresh of the Portfolio Valuator data.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional. Limit to a single config entry.

restart_stream.name: Restart WebSocket stream
restart_stream.description: Reconnect the WebSocket to the Portfolio Valuator service.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional. Limit to a single config entry.

auth_failed.title: Portfolio Valuator: authentication failed
auth_failed.description: The API token for **{title}** ({host}) was rejected by the Portfolio Valuator service. Open the integration options and update the token to restore access.
